assumptionRegistry.assumption: PRG-281 execution output remains a required precondition for PRG-282
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: execution contract or report label changes
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require m30 execution report label/ok and PRG-281=done

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Final rehearsal report is still the canonical release-readiness source
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: release readiness moves away from out/final_rehearsal/report.json
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: require final report label plus releaseReady=true and queuedGapCount=0

assumptionRegistry.assumption: M30 should stay active while the final queue is frozen closed
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: program model changes to allow zero active milestones
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: assert plan.activeMilestone and goal_state activeMilestoneId equal M30 while activeQueueCount=0

assumptionRegistry.assumption: Reviewer-facing docs must stay synchronized on one governance command and artifact path
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: official reviewer-facing docs move to a different file set
assumptionRegistry.verificationPlan: enforce token checks across PROGRAM_PLAN, SUBMISSION, and USAGE

assumptionRegistry.assumption: The demo evidence panel should expose the M30 governance report
assumptionRegistry.invalidationSignal: site evidence architecture stops consuming report snapshots

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Wire m30-governance-check into ci for final anti-drift enforcement
decisionRegistry.decision: Add an explicit M30 governance target in CI
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if final package validation moves to a dedicated release orchestrator
tradeoffs: con: CI now depends on handoff docs and demo snapshots

alternativesConsidered: introduce a synthetic post-M30 closeout milestone
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Keep M30 active while requiring PRG-282 done and no open M30 rows
decisionRegistry.decision: Represent final product handoff as an active milestone with zero open queue
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if final rehearsal no longer requires an active milestone status
tradeoffs: pro: preserves one-active-milestone contract and enables releaseReady=true
con: active status must be interpreted alongside queue closure

alternativesConsidered: allow governance pass before final rehearsal is clear
treat final rehearsal as advisory only
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Gate on queuedGapCount=0 and releaseReady=true after PRG-282 completion
decisionRegistry.decision: Require final rehearsal releaseReady=true before governance passes
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if release readiness is computed outside out/final_rehearsal/report.json
tradeoffs: pro: governance reflects actual release state
con: tracker/docs must be synchronized before the gate can pass

decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Emit canonical replay commands plus SHA256 manifest for tracker/docs/report artifacts
decisionRegistry.decision: Publish a hashed M30 handoff package
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if artifact attestation is delegated to external release tooling
tradeoffs: con: artifact set must remain stable

alternativesConsidered: leave demo on M29 governance snapshot only
avoid demo synchronization in final handoff
decisionRegistry.chosenOption: Require DEMO, build_index, and site_smoke to reference reports/m30_governance.report.json
decisionRegistry.decision: Synchronize demo evidence snapshots with the M30 governance report
decisionRegistry.reversalCondition: if demo evidence stops consuming site/reports snapshots
tradeoffs: pro: reviewer-facing site matches the final package
con: one more artifact must be regenerated with site builds

riskLedger.mitigation: Governance gate requires PRG-282 done and zero open M30 queue rows.
riskLedger.risk: M30 queue drift can reopen final work after handoff

riskLedger.mitigation: Token checks enforce synchronized command/artifact references across release docs.
riskLedger.risk: Release-facing docs can diverge from the executable governance command

riskLedger.mitigation: Governance gate requires final rehearsal releaseReady=true with queuedGapCount=0.
riskLedger.risk: Release-readiness can become stale after tracker edits

riskLedger.mitigation: DEMO, build_index, and site_smoke all require the m30 governance snapshot.
riskLedger.risk: Demo evidence panel can lag behind the final governance artifact

riskLedger.mitigation: Decision registry records the zero-open-queue interpretation for final handoff.
riskLedger.risk: One-active-milestone semantics may be misread as unfinished product state
